title: Eva 02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle
display_title: Eva 02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle
wikitext:
[]: Eva-02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Aug 15, 2021 4:32 am During Asuka's instrumentality segment, there's several flashback scenes depicting her days training to become a pilot. One such scene shows a CAD screen of her training in the "simulator", with her Eva fighting off generic enemies (they do have a core though). This is of course reminiscent of Shinji training between his first and second battles (4th and 5th angel respectively, in NTE continuity). If you look closely, the Eva's head has a design reminiscent of NGE, i.e. without the "horns": I'm sure in-universe this simply means that at some early stage of development, Eva-02 had an NGE-like design, and the horns were added in a later revision (or maybe it had the horns all along, but the 3D model inside the simulator was "simplified"). That is, I don't think it implies any in-universe connection to the NGE continuity.

[]: Re: Eva-02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle             Quote Post by The_Max » Sun Aug 15, 2021 4:59 am Can't wait for the next movie, a new Eva-02 will be shown made of salvaged teeth of 3.0+1.0 and Asuka saying "it's still Eva-02, backdoor code 6969", then the unit will evolve to be a mass of light and flesh in order to spread on the battlefield her blood and guts when destroyed by the plot armor

[]: Re: Eva-02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Aug 15, 2021 5:13 am The_Max wrote: Can't wait for the next movie, a new Eva-02 will be shown made of salvaged teeth of 3.0+1.0 and Asuka saying "it's still Eva-02, backdoor code 6969", then the unit will evolve to be a mass of light and flesh in order to spread on the battlefield her blood and guts when destroyed by the plot armor

chunks.content:
Article: Eva 02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle
[]: Eva-02 Missing the Horns During Simulator Battle             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Aug 15, 2021 4:32 am During Asuka's instrumentality segment, there's several flashback scenes depicting her days training to become a pilot. One such scene shows a CAD screen of her training in the "simulator", with her Eva fighting off generic enemies (they do have a core though). This is of course reminiscent of Shinji training between his first and second battles (4th and 5th angel respectively, in NTE continuity). If you look closely, the Eva's head has a design reminiscent of NGE, i.e. without the "horns": I'm sure in-universe this simply means that at some early stage of development, Eva-02 had an NGE-like design, and the horns were added in a later revision (or maybe it had the horns all along, but the 3D model inside the simulator was "simplified"). That is, I don't think it implies any in-universe connection to the NGE continuity.
